places.name: Österreichische Nationalbibliothek (Austrian National Library)
places.description: The beautiful baroque library of the Hapsburg empire.

places.name: Stephansdom Crypt
places.description: The crypt of the imposing Stephensdom holds royal intestines and thousands of skeletons.

places.name: Habsburg Imperial Crypt
places.description: The final resting place for the remains of 143 Habsburg royalty.

places.name: Schmetterlinghaus: The Imperial Butterfly Park
places.description: A tropical paradise just a short trip from the opera house is filled with beautiful winged creatures.

places.name: Clock Museum
places.description: A small museum filled with over 1,000 clocks, and one particular clock calibrated to run until the year 9999.

places.name: Karlskirche (St. Charles's Church)
places.description: Built to give thanks for the passing of a plague epidemic, this cathedral is a one-of-a-kind architectural hybrid.

places.name: Kriminalmuseum
places.description: Macabre museum devoted to historical Viennese murders.

places.name: Palmenhaus
places.description: Dine amidst exotic plants at this former royal greenhouse.

places.name: Justizcafe
places.description: A rooftop restaurant hides in plain sight atop Vienna's Palace of Justice.

places.name: Vollpension
places.description: Visiting this café is like visiting the Austrian grandma you wish you had.
